article_meta.title: Shopping These Giant Yankee Candles are 40% off before Valentine's Day By Miska Salemann Published Feb

reasoning: The model flagged genuine promotional language in the author’s prose and avoided quoting errors, but used non-supported bias type labels, missed many clear author-level spin/adjectives, included at least one questionable flag (the affiliate disclosure), and violated the output format by using markdown fences.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged items come from the author’s own prose; no quoted reviewer lines were flagged.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Flagging the affiliate disclosure as ‘Commercial Bias’ is overreaching; others are defensible promotional spin.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed multiple promotional phrases and subjective qualifiers (e.g., ‘deal-hungry shoppers,’ ‘steep discount delivers its own kind of euphoria,’ ‘room-filling fragrance,’ ‘has your Valentine’s vibe completely handled,’ ‘just $15’).
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used unsupported labels like ‘Commercial Bias’ and ‘Selection Bias’ instead of valid categories (e.g., Spin, Slant, Subjective Qualifying Adjectives, Sensationalism).
